description_long: This object is a classic snowman composed of two large, stacked snowballs forming the body and head. The head features a pointed orange carrot-like nose and two small, round eyes, giving it a friendly expression. Three round buttons are vertically aligned on the front of the lower snowball, simulating a traditional snowman’s buttoned torso. Two thin, stick-like arms extend outward from the sides of the body, angled slightly upward. The snowman is devoid of any headwear or scarf, and its surface appears matte and slightly rough, resembling compacted snow. The overall appearance is simple and charming, suitable for placement in parks, sidewalks, or urban winter displays.
description: A two-segment snowman with a carrot nose, button details, and stick arms, featuring a matte, snowy surface. It has a friendly, minimalistic design with no headwear or scarf.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carrot nose, two eyes, three buttons, and both stick arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding carrot nose, one eye, and the left stick arm.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the snowman with both stick arms visible and no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view with the carrot nose, one eye, and the right stick arm visible.
attribute_limb_representation: stick arms extending from the sides
